title: MW source-abbreviation to diachronic layer map (expanded seed)
description: Conservative, reviewable mapping from Monier-Williams <ls> source abbreviations to coarse diachronic layers. Still a SEED, not a finished chronology: the highest-frequency sources are mapped, the long tail and all genuinely ambiguous sigla are left unknown, and book/section variants (e.g. 'MBh. i', 'ŚBr. xiv') are resolved to their base sigla at lookup time. Do not present these layers as exact dates.
decisionRules: Samhita, Brahmana, Aranyaka, Upanishad, Srauta/Grhya/Sulba sutra, Pratisakhya, Anukramani, and Nighantu -> vedic.
Apastamba (Āp, Āpast) is mapped to vedic on the basis of its Srautasutra; this is a judgment call (its Dharmasutra is later).
Mahabharata/Ramayana and their parvans, plus Bhagavadgita and Nala episodes -> epic.
Kavya, drama, story literature, and dated Buddhist narrative (Divyavadana, Lalitavistara, Jatakamala) -> classical.
Paninian grammar, Nyaya/Vaisheshika/Samkhya/Yoga/Vedanta sastra, jyotisa/ganita/astronomy, ayurveda, poetics, dharmasastra (Manu, Yajnavalkya, Gautama), and music -> technical.
Named indigenous lexicons / koshas (Amarakosa, Nanarthaprakasa, Galanos) and modern dictionary references (BRD, NBD) -> lexicographic.
Commentators cited by name (Say, Nilak, Kull, Mahidh, Sch) are left unknown because the cited layer differs from the commentator's own date.
Single-letter sigla (A, T) and bare roman/arabic numerals are parsing fragments and are left unknown.
assumptions: Layers are coarse buckets for comparison, not dates.
Brahmana, Aranyaka, Upanishadic, Sutra, and Pratisakhya sources are folded into 'vedic' at this resolution.
Dharmasastra (Mn, Yajn, Gaut) is mapped to 'technical' (sastra), not 'classical'.
Book/section variants are resolved to their base sigla by baseForm() at lookup time, so 'MBh. i' inherits the layer of 'MBh'.
Editorial and catalogue references (ib., W., MW., Cat., Col., Inscr.) are not textual witnesses; they are treated as 'unknown' for chronology.
Every source not present in 'map' (after base-form fallback) resolves to 'unknown' and should enter the source-layer review queue.
